programme.title: NFL 360

programme.desc: The story of one of the greatest players in NFL history and his impact both on and off the field.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classic Games
programme.desc: After trailing 10-0 at the end of the first quarter of Super Bowl XXII, the Redskins scored 42 unanswered points, including a record-breaking 35 points in the second quarter, and setting several other Super Bowl records.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: Doug Williams grew up without running water in rural Louisiana, played quarterback in an era when few African Americans did, overcoming prejudice and hardship to become a Heisman candidate, a first round draft pick, and ultimately, a Super Bowl MVP.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2009: New England Patriots vs. New York Jets, Week 2
programme.desc: Leigh Bodden had three of the four interceptions thrown by Mark Sanchez and the New England Patriots defense allowed just one touchdown and 226 yards in a 31-14 win over the Jets.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Manning threw for 308 yards and four touchdowns, including a 65-yarder to Reggie Wayne to go ahead for good, and the Colts beat the Jacksonville Jaguars 35-31 Thursday night to improve to 14-0 for the first time in franchise history.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Learn Nathalie Sheehan's keys to teaching her students, including 2 things she thinks that every golfer should be doing.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Hale Irwin teaches skills and strategies to help improve your golf game.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Hale Irwin shares tips and tricks on his short game.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Hale Irwin shares tips on how to sink more puts and his experience on the Ryder Cup team.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Learn how to drive the ball farther of the tee with help from David Duval.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: David Duval shares tips to help players control distance with their irons, how to grip club, and gain more consistency through entire bag.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: David Duval and Charlie Rymer share tips and drills that cover all aspects of golf.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: A distinctive golf course feature becomes the setting for high drama as the players battle for immunity. One competitor's timely use of a mulligan earns safety, setting up an elimination match which comes down to the last putt.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The remaining competitors take a road trip south on the Grand Strand, where choosing the right opponents could prove lucrative for one player. Accuracy off the tee is tested, and an untimely error threatens to derail one contestant's dream.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: As the field dwindles, players must negotiate the limbo wall to secure immunity. One competitor commits a costly mental mistake which could lead to disaster. A surprise development brings Super Immunity back into the discussion.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The competition heats up and one of the most impressive shots in Big Break history highlights the fight for safety. The endgame for Super Immunity is in sight as the final four participants are determined.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The four remaining players vie for an advantage which will go a long way toward determining who will play in the championship match.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Two competitors remain. Only one will be crowned Champion of Big Break Florida. From the Omni Amelia Island Plantation Resort in Amelia Island, Fla.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: From challenging lies to putting errant shots back on track and more, Rory offers up his approach to handling the kinds of shots and strategy that can improve scores and impress golf buddies.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.sub-title: Birdie Challenge with Aaron Hicks & Hailey Ostrom
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal invites MLB star Aaron Hicks and golf influencer Hailey Ostrom for a high-stakes round of golf.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair joins World Series champion Cody Ross to face NFL Hall of Famer Brian Urlacher and MLB star Mark Mulder in a match of bold moves.

programme.title: Breaking into the Game: Beginners
programme.desc: Shot at The Club at Ibis, Martin Hall's new series is the definitive video golf instruction piece for beginners, providing a solid foundation for new golfers of any age.

programme.title: The Conor Moore Show
programme.desc: The most popular comedy skits and sketches from three seasons of The Conor Moore Show; from marriage counseling to the best (or worst) swing coach in the world, Conor and friends are guaranteed to provide a laugh.

programme.title: My Roots: Ernie Els
programme.desc: Follow Ernie's journey from his early years in South Africa, to his climb to world No. 1, his battles with Tiger and the creation of his foundation Els for Autism.

programme.title: My Roots: Bernhard Langer
programme.desc: Bernhard Langer shares his own story in open and honest language, giving golf fans an unprecedented look at his life, losses, and love of the game.

programme.title: My Roots
programme.desc: The life and career of Darren Clarke of Northern Ireland; the path of golf, his life and his career, from Wake Forest University to the European Tour, the PGA Tour and beyond; his experience as a member of the European Ryder Cup team.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: Malia Loo was introduced to the game of golf by her father David, and since she was a little girl, he's been her swing coach, mentor, and caddy.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: While chasing his dream of playing college golf, Wyatt Worthington experienced overt prejudice which led him to a bout of paralyzing depression.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: With the guidance of Paula Tucker and her "Fore Life" program, Patrick has become one of the most promising young golfers in Florida.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: 2016 European Ryder Cup player Matthew Fitzpatrick shares his best tips, drills and instruction as he navigates the beautiful Loblolly in Hobe Sound, Florida.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: PGA Tour standout Wyndham Clark goes in depth with his on-course strategies. Wyndham gives insight into how he plays par 5's aggressively and shows unique viewpoints on when it is worth it to lay-up on par 3's.
